# agentY MCP server — runtime dependencies.
#
# agentY is now an MCP server driven by an MCP host (Claude Desktop). The host
# supplies the model, so there is no LLM SDK here and no Ollama. These deps cover
# the ComfyUI client, image handling, HuggingFace model management, and web search.

# Model Context Protocol SDK (FastMCP server + stdio transport)
mcp>=1.26.0

# ComfyUI HTTP/WebSocket client
requests>=2.31.0
websockets>=12.0

# Config / secrets
python-dotenv>=1.0.0

# Image handling (resize, format conversion, resolution)
Pillow>=10.0.0

# Web search (no API key required) — ddgs is the maintained successor of the
# deprecated duckduckgo-search package.
ddgs>=9.0.0

# Video frame sampling so Claude can self-QA generated video (Kling multi-shot,
# etc.). Degrades gracefully (OpenCV / ffmpeg-on-PATH fallbacks) if absent.
imageio[ffmpeg]>=2.34.0

# Progress bars for HuggingFace model downloads
tqdm>=4.66.0

# Windows-only: the mcp SDK relies on pywin32 on Windows, but it is NOT pulled in
# automatically, so list it explicitly to be vendored into the .mcpb's lib/.
# src/__init__.py registers its loader dirs (win32, win32/lib, pywin32_system32)
# from lib/ at startup. Skipped on non-Windows.
pywin32>=306; sys_platform == "win32"
